title: Otis (OTIS) Up 6.5% in Past 6 Months Amid FX Woes: Here's Why
text: Digital innovation and operational improvement benefit Otis (OTIS) despite the headwind from foreign exchange translation.

title: Up 11% in a Month, Is This Elevator Stock a Buy Right Now?
text: Otis reported mixed earnings in its second quarter. A deeper look shows the quarter may have been better than it appeared, but there are risks in its China business.
